children.heading: .—Federal agency
children.label: 1 .—Federal agency
children.text: The term “federal agency” has the same meaning given that term in .section 102 of this title

children.heading: TTY.—
children.label: 2 TTY.—
children.text: The term “TTY” means a text-telephone used in the transmission of coded signals through the nationwide telecommunications system.
